audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in rpc_request.cc are guarded: (1) both concrete `ProcessRequest` callers null-check `method_board` before calling `CallMethod`; (2) `ServiceBoard` constructor always sets `_service_board = this` on every `MethodBoard`, and `_svc` is always non-null; (3) `RpcController()` constructor initializes `_impl = new RpcControllerImpl()` (non-null); (4) stream accesses use `weak_ptr::lock()` with explicit null guards before use.
